# GitHub Reusable Workflow: Sync Documentation (Push Mode)

<!-- usage:start -->

## Usage

```yaml
name: Sync Documentation (Push Mode)
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  sync-docs-push:
    uses: hoverkraft-tech/public-docs/.github/workflows/sync-docs-push.yml@675b0368efdff84820ff78413ea8a5eabebe9f7c # copilot/centralize-project-documentation
    secrets:
      # GitHub token with write access to public-docs repository
      # This input is required.
      PUBLIC_DOCS_TOKEN: ""
    with:
      # Source repository name (e.g., compose-action)
      # This input is required.
      source_repo: ""

      # Path to documentation in source repo (default: docs)
      # Default: `docs`
      docs_path: docs

      # Target path in public-docs (e.g., projects/compose-action)
      # This input is required.
      target_path: ""

      # Branch to sync from (default: main)
      # Default: `main`
      branch: main

      # Include README.md from repository root
      # Default: `true`
      include_readme: true
```

<!-- usage:end -->
<!-- inputs:start -->

## Inputs

### Workflow Call Inputs

| **Input**            | **Description**                                            | **Required** | **Type**    | **Default** |
| -------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ------------ | ----------- | ----------- |
| **`source_repo`**    | Source repository name (e.g., compose-action)              | **true**     | **string**  | -           |
| **`docs_path`**      | Path to documentation in source repository (default: docs) | **false**    | **string**  | `docs`      |
| **`target_path`**    | Target path in public-docs (e.g., projects/compose-action) | **true**     | **string**  | -           |
| **`branch`**         | Branch to sync from (default: main)                        | **false**    | **string**  | `main`      |
| **`include_readme`** | Include README.md from repository root                     | **false**    | **boolean** | `true`      |

<!-- inputs:end -->
<!-- secrets:start -->

## Secrets

| **Secret**              | **Description**                                          | **Required** |
| ----------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | ------------ |
| **`PUBLIC_DOCS_TOKEN`** | GitHub token with write access to public-docs repository | **true**     |

<!-- secrets:end -->
